message:
fix(acfs-global,acfs-update): drop user-controlled ACFS_BIN_DIR fallback during runtime resolution

Both wrappers' `prepare_runtime_context_from_home` previously did:

    state_bin_dir="$(read_bin_dir_from_state_file ... || true)"
    sanitized_bin_dir="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" ...)"
    ACFS_BIN_DIR="${state_bin_dir:-${sanitized_bin_dir:-}}"

The intent was "prefer the bin_dir recorded in state.json, but fall
back to whatever ACFS_BIN_DIR the caller passed in if state.json
doesn't pin one." That fallback is exactly the wrong half of the
trust model: we already trust state.json (from disk, owned by the
target user), but ACFS_BIN_DIR is an env var the caller controls,
which on a poisoned machine could point at a stale/sibling bin
directory and silently make us run the wrong installed binary.

Drop the env-fallback half. If state.json doesn't pin a bin_dir,
ACFS_BIN_DIR is left empty so downstream `find_acfs_bin*` paths
have to resolve against the real installed location (which the
hardened helpers from the previous commit already do safely). If
state.json *does* pin one, behaviour is unchanged.

Companion fix in `main()` of both wrappers: only fall back to
`current_home/.acfs/state.json` when no explicit TARGET_HOME was
asked for, *or* when current_home matches TARGET_HOME. Without that
guard, a user running `acfs-global --target $other_user` on a
machine where their own current_home also has a state.json could
end up reading the wrong state file.

tests/unit/test_changelog_export_status.sh
  Two new regression cases:
    - test_acfs_update_wrapper_ignores_poisoned_bin_dir_after_runtime_resolution
    - test_acfs_global_wrapper_ignores_poisoned_bin_dir_after_runtime_resolution
  Both seed a stale `bin_dir` into a current-home state.json *and*
  pass an attacker-shaped `ACFS_BIN_DIR` env var, then assert the
  wrapper resolves against the system-state target_home and reports
  `ACFS_BIN_DIR=` (empty) instead of either the stale state value
  or the env-poisoned value.

files.patch:
@@ -302,7 +302,6 @@ home_from_acfs_bin() {
 prepare_runtime_context_from_home() {
     local user_home="$1"
     local state_bin_dir=""
-    local sanitized_bin_dir=""
 
     user_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$user_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"
     [[ -n "$user_home" ]] || return 1
@@ -311,8 +310,7 @@ prepare_runtime_context_from_home() {
     ACFS_HOME="$user_home/.acfs"
     ACFS_STATE_FILE="$ACFS_HOME/state.json"
     state_bin_dir="$(read_bin_dir_from_state_file "$ACFS_STATE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)"
-    sanitized_bin_dir="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
-    ACFS_BIN_DIR="${state_bin_dir:-${sanitized_bin_dir:-}}"
+    ACFS_BIN_DIR="${state_bin_dir:-}"
 
     export TARGET_HOME ACFS_HOME ACFS_STATE_FILE ACFS_BIN_DIR
 }
@@ -653,7 +651,9 @@ main() {
             "${ACFS_STATE_FILE:-}"
             "${ACFS_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE:-}"
         )
-        [[ -n "$current_home" ]] && state_candidates+=("$current_home/.acfs/state.json")
+        if [[ -n "$current_home" ]] && [[ -z "${TARGET_HOME:-}" || "$current_home" == "${TARGET_HOME:-}" ]]; then
+            state_candidates+=("$current_home/.acfs/state.json")
+        fi
         for state_candidate in "${state_candidates[@]}"; do
             [[ -n "$state_candidate" && -f "$state_candidate" ]] || continue
             ACFS_BIN_DIR="$(read_bin_dir_from_state_file "$state_candidate" 2>/dev/null || true)"

@@ -406,7 +406,6 @@ home_from_update_script() {
 prepare_runtime_context_from_home() {
   local user_home="$1"
   local state_bin_dir=""
-  local sanitized_bin_dir=""
 
   user_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$user_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"
   [[ -n "$user_home" ]] || return 1
@@ -415,8 +414,7 @@ prepare_runtime_context_from_home() {
   ACFS_HOME="$user_home/.acfs"
   ACFS_STATE_FILE="$ACFS_HOME/state.json"
   state_bin_dir="$(read_bin_dir_from_state_file "$ACFS_STATE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)"
-  sanitized_bin_dir="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
-  ACFS_BIN_DIR="${state_bin_dir:-${sanitized_bin_dir:-}}"
+  ACFS_BIN_DIR="${state_bin_dir:-}"
 
   export TARGET_HOME ACFS_HOME ACFS_STATE_FILE ACFS_BIN_DIR
 }
@@ -728,7 +726,9 @@ main() {
       "${ACFS_STATE_FILE:-}"
       "${ACFS_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE:-}"
     )
-    [[ -n "$current_home" ]] && state_candidates+=("$current_home/.acfs/state.json")
+    if [[ -n "$current_home" ]] && [[ -z "${TARGET_HOME:-}" || "$current_home" == "${TARGET_HOME:-}" ]]; then
+      state_candidates+=("$current_home/.acfs/state.json")
+    fi
     for state_candidate in "${state_candidates[@]}"; do
       [[ -n "$state_candidate" && -f "$state_candidate" ]] || continue
       ACFS_BIN_DIR="$(read_bin_dir_from_state_file "$state_candidate" 2>/dev/null || true)"

@@ -6220,6 +6220,68 @@ EOF
     cleanup_mock_env
 }
 
+test_acfs_update_wrapper_ignores_poisoned_bin_dir_after_runtime_resolution() {
+    setup_mock_env
+
+    TEST_FAKE_BIN="$TEST_HOME/fake-bin"
+    local current_home="$TEST_HOME/current-home"
+    local live_home="$TEST_HOME/live-home"
+    local stale_bin="$TEST_HOME/stale-bin"
+    local current_user=""
+    local system_state="$TEST_HOME/system-state.json"
+
+    current_user="$(id -un 2>/dev/null || whoami 2>/dev/null || true)"
+
+    mkdir -p \
+        "$TEST_FAKE_BIN" \
+        "$current_home/.acfs" \
+        "$live_home/.acfs/scripts/lib" \
+        "$stale_bin" \
+        "$TEST_HOME/probe"
+
+    cat > "$current_home/.acfs/state.json" <<EOF
+{
+  "target_user": "$current_user",
+  "target_home": "$current_home",
+  "bin_dir": "$stale_bin"
+}
+EOF
+    cat > "$live_home/.acfs/state.json" <<EOF
+{
+  "target_user": "$current_user",
+  "target_home": "$live_home"
+}
+EOF
+    cat > "$live_home/.acfs/scripts/lib/update.sh" <<'EOF'
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+printf 'TARGET_HOME=%s ACFS_BIN_DIR=%s ARG1=%s\n' "${TARGET_HOME:-}" "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" "${1:-}"
+EOF
+    chmod +x "$live_home/.acfs/scripts/lib/update.sh"
+    cat > "$system_state" <<EOF
+{
+  "target_user": "$current_user",
+  "target_home": "$live_home"
+}
+EOF
+
+    cp "$REPO_ROOT/scripts/acfs-update" "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs-update"
+    chmod +x "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs-update"
+
+    local output=""
+    output=$(HOME="$current_home" PATH="$TEST_FAKE_BIN:/usr/bin:/bin" \
+        ACFS_BIN_DIR="$stale_bin" \
+        ACFS_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE="$system_state" \
+        /bin/bash "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs-update" --help 2>&1)
+
+    if [[ "$output" == "TARGET_HOME=$live_home ACFS_BIN_DIR= ARG1=--help" ]]; then
+        harness_pass "acfs-update wrapper ignores poisoned bin_dir after runtime resolution"
+    else
+        harness_fail "acfs-update wrapper ignores poisoned bin_dir after runtime resolution" "$output"
+    fi
+
+    cleanup_mock_env
+}
+
 test_acfs_update_wrapper_ignores_stale_home_adjacent_target_user() {
     setup_mock_env
 
@@ -6714,6 +6776,69 @@ EOF
     cleanup_mock_env
 }
 
+test_acfs_global_wrapper_ignores_poisoned_bin_dir_after_runtime_resolution() {
+    setup_mock_env
+
+    TEST_FAKE_BIN="$TEST_HOME/fake-bin"
+    local current_home="$TEST_HOME/current-home"
+    local live_home="$TEST_HOME/live-home"
+    local stale_bin="$TEST_HOME/stale-bin"
+    local current_user=""
+    local system_state="$TEST_HOME/system-state.json"
+
+    current_user="$(id -un 2>/dev/null || whoami 2>/dev/null || true)"
+
+    mkdir -p \
+        "$TEST_FAKE_BIN" \
+        "$current_home/.acfs" \
+        "$live_home/.local/bin" \
+        "$live_home/.acfs" \
+        "$stale_bin" \
+        "$TEST_HOME/probe"
+
+    cat > "$current_home/.acfs/state.json" <<EOF
+{
+  "target_user": "$current_user",
+  "target_home": "$current_home",
+  "bin_dir": "$stale_bin"
+}
+EOF
+    cat > "$live_home/.acfs/state.json" <<EOF
+{
+  "target_user": "$current_user",
+  "target_home": "$live_home"
+}
+EOF
+    cat > "$live_home/.local/bin/acfs" <<'EOF'
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+printf 'TARGET_HOME=%s ACFS_BIN_DIR=%s ARG1=%s\n' "${TARGET_HOME:-}" "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" "${1:-}"
+EOF
+    chmod +x "$live_home/.local/bin/acfs"
+    cat > "$system_state" <<EOF
+{
+  "target_user": "$current_user",
+  "target_home": "$live_home"
+}
+EOF
+
+    cp "$REPO_ROOT/scripts/acfs-global" "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs"
+    chmod +x "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs"
+
+    local output=""
+    output=$(HOME="$current_home" PATH="$TEST_FAKE_BIN:/usr/bin:/bin" \
+        ACFS_BIN_DIR="$stale_bin" \
+        ACFS_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE="$system_state" \
+        /bin/bash "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs" version 2>&1)
+
+    if [[ "$output" == "TARGET_HOME=$live_home ACFS_BIN_DIR= ARG1=version" ]]; then
+        harness_pass "global acfs wrapper ignores poisoned bin_dir after runtime resolution"
+    else
+        harness_fail "global acfs wrapper ignores poisoned bin_dir after runtime resolution" "$output"
+    fi
+
+    cleanup_mock_env
+}
+
 test_acfs_global_wrapper_ignores_stale_home_adjacent_target_user() {
     setup_mock_env
 
@@ -8053,6 +8178,7 @@ main() {
     test_acfs_update_wrapper_does_not_guess_current_home_when_target_home_is_unresolved || true
     test_acfs_update_wrapper_ignores_stale_explicit_acfs_home_when_system_state_points_to_live_install || true
     test_acfs_update_wrapper_prefers_explicit_acfs_home_over_current_home_when_system_state_is_missing || true
+    test_acfs_update_wrapper_ignores_poisoned_bin_dir_after_runtime_resolution || true
     test_acfs_update_wrapper_ignores_stale_home_adjacent_target_user || true
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_uses_system_state_target_home_when_getent_unavailable || true
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_repairs_runtime_home_on_direct_exec || true
@@ -8065,6 +8191,7 @@ main() {
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_does_not_guess_current_home_when_target_home_is_unresolved || true
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_ignores_stale_explicit_acfs_home_when_system_state_points_to_live_install || true
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_prefers_explicit_acfs_home_over_current_home_when_system_state_is_missing || true
+    test_acfs_global_wrapper_ignores_poisoned_bin_dir_after_runtime_resolution || true
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_ignores_stale_home_adjacent_target_user || true
     test_doctor_agent_checks_use_target_context_under_root_home || true
     test_doctor_agent_checks_prefer_persisted_bin_dir_over_poisoned_env_bin_dir || true
